title: 7 Travel Stocks to Buy Right Now
text: As the Covid-19 crisis initially capsized global societies, many daring investors targeted travel stocks to buy for the long haul. Their thinking centered on the eventual comeback effect.

title: INTRODUCING VIBEE: THE DESTINATION EXPERIENCE COMPANY BUILT FOR MUSIC FANS, FOUNDED BY LIVE NATION
text: LOS ANGELES , April 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  Vibee  - the new music-led destination experience company - has officially arrived and is transforming the way fans travel and connect with their favorite artists. Founded by Live Nation, Vibee builds unforgettable immersive trips for music lovers in the most sought after destinations around the world.

title: 2 Top Metaverse Stocks to Buy in April
text: Ticketmaster embraces virtual events and NFTs, with more metaverse ideas to come. Sony is setting the pace for sports production in the metaverse.

title: Live Nation (LYV) Boosts Payment Options With PayPal Partnership
text: Live Nation's (LYV) collaboration with PayPal paves a path to multiple payment options across 21 countries. This includes access to PayPal Checkout, PayPal Pay Later and Venmo.

title: Live Nation Lets Concertgoers Buy Tickets Via PayPal
text: PayPal has joined forces with Live Nation to become Ticketmaster's preferred payments partner. “Our goal is to seamlessly connect artists and event organizers with fans wherever they are in the world, and PayPal helps us take that to the next level with a truly global-reaching payments solution,” Ticketmaster President Mark Yovich said in a Monday (April 3) news release.
